title: Instrument d'adhésion

pages.text:
GOVERNMENT OF TUVALU

DEPARTMENT OF FOREIGN AFFAIRS

LIE AR LLE E SS eee

VERNMENT OF TUVAL

INSTRUCTION OF ACCESSION

N

WHEREAS the Convention relating to the International Exhibitions was done at Paris on 22 November 1928 :

WHEREAS the Convention was amended and supplemented by the

Protocol of 30 November 1972, the Amendments of 24 June 1982 and 31

May 1988 :

AND WHEREAS Article 3 of the said Protocol provides that the

Protocol shall remain open for accession by Governments Parties to the 1928

Convention after 29 November 1973 :

NOW THEREFORE, the Government of Tuvalu hereby accedes to the 1982 Convention and the 1972 Protocol, including the Amendments of 24 June 1982 and 31 May 1988, and undertakes faithfully to fulfill and carry out all the provisions therein contained.

IN WITNESS WHEREOF, L Apisai lelemia, Prime Minister and

Minister of Foreign Affairs, the Government of Tuvalu, have signed this

Instrument of Accession and caused the Seal of the Government of Tuvalu to be hereunto affixed.

Done at Funafuti, Tuvalu, on the sixth day of September of two thousand and seven. |

Cu

Hon. Apisai Ielemia

Prime Minister and

Minister of Foreign Affairs
